title: Chapter 9
content:
Chapter 9: Chapter 9: Oh My... You Are Teaching Me Bad Things, My Dear Wen

It was an ass... a plump ass fit for a top-tier MILF, possessing a motherly marshmallow softness that slowly devoured his senses to oblivion.

"Oh... then, are my hips really that good?" Arielle couldn’t bring herself to say the word "ass".

It was just too lewd for a dignified old woman like her... although she was lonely, she wasn’t crazy enough to act like a slut and speak such obscene word.

She had never even pleasured herself as far as she could remember...

Arielle refrained from doing that, as it was better to act like a dignified, loving wife to her husband... it was her way of repaying the sacrifices made by the love of her life, who worked on the other side of the world, very far from the village.

Maybe she had only ever done the deed back when her husband used to stay in the village, and that was it... it couldn’t really be called pleasuring her selfish self, but rather making love with the man she married.

It was real love... unfortunately, she had never tasted the true pleasure that most of the MILFs in the village talked about. Well, it was just a legend now...one that was gathering a mountain of dust in the corner, remaining a mere myth for however many eons had passed.

As for the current situation...its just her pure MILF instincts, as It is purely out of control, not even her logical mind can explain what’s happening to her body.

That was also the exact reason why her body was burning to its absolute limit; the way her son Owen was acting was making her feel like a needy woman...not a caring mother!

"Mom, it’s called an ass... calling your plump ass a hip is a heresy...a taint to the holy sacrament. Even the gods from above would facepalm at such blatant words coming from your mouth." Owen never stopped pinching her waist, moving from time to time as he is about to reach the plump busty ass, forcing her to shift as he enjoyed that heaven of softness.

"That’s definitely a weird way of speaking, my dear Wen... it’s not something I can say."

"Hehe, of course you can’t speak such words because you are completely new to this! So I will teach you, Mom." Owen said, slowly slipping his hands down, trying to feel her softness from her back!

"Oh my... you are teaching me bad things, my dear Wen. The blood of your father is truly running through you!" she spoke, while barely holding back her voice as she could feel something touching her hips.

It took everything she had not to moan out loud.

"Hehe, let’s forget about Father. He isn’t here anyway~" Owen was honestly getting a little irritated hearing that freaking pathetic father shit again and again...

Hell, it was spoiling the buildup tension every time those words popped out!

Owen wanted to snap the head of his "father" and throw it’s body to the random cliff...

Not really but, he will definitely cuckold him!

"Oh my..." Arielle was interrupted as her voice simply cracked when Owen gripped her ass!

’Oh... hehe, it’s effective! That father thing was making my head go numb.’ Owen couldn’t stand to hear any more of it, so he acted entirely based on his own will!

She wasn’t even fighting back... because it was clearly obvious that she loved what was happening right now.

Against all the logic, he could feel that Arielle was only using the word "father" to obscure her true intentions!

She was just too shy to express everything... a shy MILF who had a wild side just ready to be discovered!

"Okay, I will teach you, Mom," he spoke with pure seriousness, like a teacher trying his best to instruct a brat in middle school.

"Oh my... then how about I become your student for now, my dear Owen~?" Arielle was a MILF, after all...she couldn’t just be the one getting teased every single time, right... so instead of being shy, why not just play along with everything?

It was just a mom and son bonding... but in a much wilder way!

"Hoho, now you are acting like a student? Are you really interested in learning such lewd stuff mom~?" Owen teased her, wanting to see her shy reaction... but instead, he received a mischievous smirk!

How could she act so playful right after she had just said it wasn’t the norm in the village?!

Owen was forced to gulp hard internally; maybe he could move much wilder now.

"Oh my... oh my, I didn’t mean it, my dear Wen. Ohh! Maybe teacher Wen~?" Her bold response made his cock bulge even more.

It was twitching now... moving up and down, pressing right against her ass, which made her ears turn completely pink.

She managed to control her bearings, showing just a slight blush!

’Heaven... what a full fledged MILF you gave me! The session for feeding me is now on the verge of collapsing!’ Owen didn’t expect that their little play would turn into such a complete twist of events.

He still recalled the failure penalty, so he needed to prioritize that first! He would rather die than have his asset turn into a tiny wiener.

"Before that, Mom... feed me first. How can I explain the trends of the city when my stomach is empty, right?" Owen spoke as he looked at her with pleading eyes... she wouldn’t be able to say no, even if the world were about to explode into smithereens.

"Oh my, oh my! How could I forget that? Then I will feed my spoiled boy first, and you can share the knowledge you gained from the city afterward~" Arielle wasn’t completely comfortable... as she veered her ass from time to time, secretly savoring the friction beneath her!

"Hehe... I can teach you while you feed me, Mom." Owen wasn’t about to let the opportunity for multitasking pass him by.
